SQL_ID  ag5xbq2s31xrd, child number 0
-------------------------------------
WITH heavy AS ( /*+ MATERIALIZE */ SELECT customer_id, SUM(amount)
revenue FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id ) SELECT * FROM heavy a JOIN
heavy b ON a.customer_id = b.customer_id WHERE a.revenue > 1000

Plan hash value: 2847391051
